title: Dattatreya Mantra
intro: Read the Dattatreya Mantra with meaning. Chant this supreme mantra to receive the grace of Lord Dattatreya.
description:
Main Mantra

Om Dram Dattatreyaya Namah.

English Meaning

Om,
I bow to
Lord Dattatreya,
who is
the embodiment
of the Supreme Reality.

faq.q1: When should Lord Dattatreya Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Lord Dattatreya Mantra is considered auspicious when chanted in the morning or during Brahma Muhurta.
faq.q2: How many times should Lord Dattatreya Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 11, 21, 51, or 108 times.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Lord Dattatreya Mantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting this mantra is believed to bring spiritual growth, wisdom, inner peace, and the blessings of Lord Dattatreya.
faq.q4: Can anyone chant Lord Dattatreya Mantra?
faq.a4: Yes, anyone can chant Lord Dattatreya Mantra with faith and devotion.
faq.q5: Can Lord Dattatreya Mantra be chanted daily?
faq.a5: Yes, Lord Dattatreya Mantra can be chanted every day with devotion.
